author: @Ccbroo

text:
Not since "The Endless Summer" has a movie gone so far to depict the surfer lifestyle. Capitan Maximum continues to be a man of many mysteries, he likes women, yet he drinks mojitos. And finally someone has tapped into the destructive force that is Pinguini. 
The cinematography as always top notch, I could almost feel the mist from the waves on my skin. Grazie mille Italian Spiderman e come sempre è stato grande.
